examples: There was spasmodic fighting in the area yesterday.
He managed to stifle the spasmodic sobs of panic rising in his throat.
Spasmodic bouts of exercise are not very beneficial.
In spite of all the paper issues, commercial activity grew more and more spasmodic.
In infants and very young children, pertussis causes violent, spasmodic coughing that repeats over and over.
